payload.summary_1line: Round 1 ran successfully with status ok, but delta_ler was 0.0 and the confidence interval fields were missing. It used 72 FLOPs per syndrome and 9 parameters, so the compute footprint is tiny but there is no measured gain over baseline. There was no previous summary to compare against, so this round establishes the first baseline-like result rather than showing progress.
payload.next_hypothesis_seed: Try a slightly wider neural BP message-passing budget or a small increase in hidden width/iterations to seek positive Δ LER.
